name: Pacific Pawn Shop
description_short: Pacific Pawn Shop in Huntington Park, CA offers collateral-based pawn loans and buys/sells jewelry, power tools, and more. Open 7 days a week.
description_long:
Pacific Pawn Shop is a pawn and resale shop located at 7653 Pacific Blvd in Huntington Park, California (Los Angeles County), serving the Firestone Park Village area. The business is listed as offering pawn services alongside general buying and selling of secondhand goods. The shop operates extended weekday hours (9AM–9PM Monday through Friday) and weekend hours (10AM–6PM Saturday and Sunday), making it accessible to working adults who cannot visit during standard business hours. The owner has not completed verification on the third-party listing where this profile appears.

Pacific Pawn Shop provides collateral-based pawn loans, meaning customers bring in valuables — most notably jewelry and power tools — and receive short-term cash loans secured against those items. The shop also buys and sells items outright, giving customers two ways to monetize goods they own. Staff members named in customer-reported feedback include Erik, Johnny, and Yvette, who are cited for providing item valuations and customer service. The shop is noted to have a secure on-site parking area.

The listing highlights several distinguishing attributes: a broad and diverse inventory spanning both jewelry and tools, extended operating hours uncommon among pawn shops in the area, and a community-oriented staff approach. Third-party ratings assigned by the listing platform (not verified customer reviews) score the shop highly on reliability (9.3/10), response time (9.2/10), and pricing transparency (9.1/10). These scores reflect aggregated data from the listing service rather than a verified base of customer submissions — the shop shows zero published reviews on the platform.

Honestly assessed, Pacific Pawn Shop is a standard neighborhood pawn operation suitable for people needing fast cash against physical collateral or looking for discounted secondhand goods locally. Pawn loans everywhere carry high effective interest rates and short repayment windows — this is an industry-wide feature, not unique to this shop. The business profile on the third-party listing site (Wheree) is unverified by the owner, and the customer review summary displayed there is explicitly AI-generated from aggregated data rather than from confirmed individual reviews. Prospective customers should contact the shop directly to verify current terms and loan rates before bringing in items.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9AM–9PM Mon–Fri) — longer than most pawn shops
Secure on-site parking noted by customers
Diverse inventory spanning jewelry and power tools
Staff (Johnny, Yvette, Erik) cited for fair valuations and personalized service
Consistent listing scores for reliability (9.3) and response time (9.2)
Located on a major commercial corridor (Pacific Blvd) with easy access
cons: Zero verified customer reviews on the listing platform — AI-generated summary substitutes for real feedback
Business owner has not completed verification on the third-party listing
Pawn loans carry high effective APRs typical of the industry — rates not disclosed on this listing
Limited to collateral-based lending; no unsecured credit products available
No website or independently verifiable business information beyond a third-party directory listing
best_for: LA County residents needing same-day cash against jewelry or tools without a credit check
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted secondhand jewelry or power tools locally
People who cannot access bank loans or personal loans due to credit history
Customers who need a pawn shop with evening hours after a standard work day
diagnosis: Pacific Pawn Shop is best for Huntington Park-area residents who need quick cash against physical valuables — particularly jewelry or tools — and have limited access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that this profile is sourced entirely from an unverified third-party listing with no real customer reviews; prospective borrowers should call ahead to confirm current pawn rates and loan terms before visiting.
